summary: Merged ADR 0301 onto `main` as repository version `0.177.108` from exact-main source commit `9b539fa6fb3e0f26531f461fc71573491da370ab`, with the Semgrep wrapper, no-git snapshot path, remote build-server replay, and local pre-push gate all passing from that release tree. The first hosted-main replay remains externally blocked: GitHub `Validate` on `main` failed before runner startup because the account billing state prevented hosted jobs, and the private Gitea controller at `http://100.64.0.1:3009` kept resetting git and API connections. Because those hosted paths were not verifiably live from `main`, `platform_version` remains `0.130.71` and ADR 0301 is recorded as implemented in the repo but not yet promoted to a first verified platform version.

verification.observed: The exact-main `0.177.108` tree passed the focused Semgrep regression slice, direct Semgrep wrapper, no-git snapshot replay, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate`; the transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-targeted-pytest-r1-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-validate-semgrep-r1-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-no-git-semgrep-r1-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-remote-validate-r2-0.177.108.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1-0.177.108.txt`.

GitHub Actions created `Validate` run `23762644306` for `main`, but the job never started because the account billing state blocked hosted runners; the run payload and annotation are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-github-run-r1-0.177.108.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-github-annotations-r1-0.177.108.json`.

The private Gitea branch-validation replay could not be re-established because `http://100.64.0.1:3009` reset both git and direct HTTP/API probes during the validation window; the failed push and controller transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-push-r2-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-head-r1-0.177.108.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-api-version-r1-0.177.108.json`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0301-mainline-gitea-manual-http-r1-0.177.108.txt`.

notes: ADR 0301 is merged on `main` and implemented in repository version `0.177.108`.
The first verified platform promotion is intentionally deferred: GitHub billing blocked hosted runner startup and the private Gitea controller reset connections during the same validation window.

When hosted validation recovers, rerun the GitHub and Gitea checks from `main`, then update `versions/stack.yaml`, `workstreams.yaml`, and the ADR metadata to record the first verified platform version for ADR 0301.
